turns.content: What brings you in today?
My back's been killing me. I drive a delivery van all day, sitting for ten hours straight. Sometimes the pain shoots right down my leg.
When did this start?
A couple months now. Maybe three. Just been getting worse.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
Lower back, right here (points to lower spine). It's a sharp ache that goes down my right leg. Sometimes my foot goes numb too.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No. Nothing like that. Just my back and leg.
What medications are you currently taking?
Just ibuprofen. Doesn't do much though.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
No. Nothing like that. Just this back problem.
Are you allergic to any medications?
Nope. No allergies.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
Just the ibuprofen. I've been putting heat on it at night sometimes. Doesn't help much either.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Sitting in the van makes it a lot worse. Lying flat on the floor helps a little.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
Can barely do my job. Can't play with my kid either. Just want it to stop.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
Yeah, I smoke. Drink once in a while, not much.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
Don't think so. Not that I know of.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
No. First time anything like this has happened.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Physically it's bad — maybe an 8. Emotionally I'm just fed up and on edge. I need something that actually works.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
No. That's everything. Just fix my back so I can get back to work.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
Just trying to get through each day, man. It's not easy but what choice do I have?
And how have you been coping with all of this?
Not great. I'm just angry and tired most of the time. Pain wears you down after a while.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
Like I said, one day at a time. That's all I got.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
You keep asking the same question. I told you, I'm not coping well. Can we just get to what you're gonna do about my back?
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I already told you. Not good. Can we move on to what you're going to do about it?
